Body.Content:
Following further review, this feature continues in development. We apologize for any inconvenience. Users will now be able to use File Type filters and People refiners to apply search criteria to get to relevant files faster in the CIQ menu.

GA date: October CY2025

message.Title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): The chat experience now offers better search refinement on CIQ menu Files tab
